This is a testharness.js-based test.

[FAIL] Holding Escape without event.preventDefault() should cause fullscreen exit
  assert_equals: fullscreen should deactivate expected null but got Element node <body><div id="log"></div>\n<script src="/fullscreen/api/d...
Harness: the test ran to completion.
